disclaimer: Multi-epoch summaries are scheduling provenance records only. Inconsistent detections across epochs are expected and do not constitute confirmation. Consistent detection across epochs does not imply a technosignature without independent external validation.

records.operator_notes: Signal present in epoch 1 and 3 but absent in epoch 2. Possible intermittent RFI or scheduling gap.
IR excess stable across all four photometric epochs. Source not resolved as known contaminant.
